questions.text: PR to PO Conversion can be done with:
options: Manage Material Coverage with Supersession and Process Purchase Requisitions

questions.text: The Inter/Intra Company Flows Monitoring Report is used to ensure consistency between physical and financial flows
During the process of Receiving Entity Activities, this is the order of the activities that must be completed (for a CSC Supply Planner):
options: PO Conversion, Trigger Inbound Delivery Goods Receipt, Inventory Reporting, Confirmation of Product line in the PO
PO Conversion, Confirmation of Product line in the PO, Trigger Inbound Delivery Goods Receipt, Inventory Reporting
PO Conversion, Inventory Reporting, Trigger Inbound Delivery Goods Receipt, Confirmation of Product line in the PO

questions.text: PR to PO Conversion, Product line confirmation in the PO and Good receipts confirmation are activities done by CSC Supply Planners
When performing a Good Receipt Confirmation, the inbound delivery details will indicate an ASN Number. This ASN Number has 3 different versions for Supplier, NEO and 3PL
What is the basis for calculating and booking excess and obsolete provisions?
options: Industry benchmarks and average write-off rates
Negotiations with suppliers for potential returns

questions.text: Who is responsible for reviewing the sensitive stock movements flagged in Process Control Tool?
options: The Finance Controller / Manufacturing Finance Controller
